reviews.comment:
Baños bien, cargamos combustible todo bien y normal pero la mención especial se la lleva el chico del kiosco un genio RE amable, buena onda. Fuimos 12/08 tipo 13.15hr

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms were fine, we filled up with fuel, everything was normal and fine, but the special mention goes to the guy at the kiosk—a really nice, friendly guy. We went on August 12th around 1:15 pm.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM3eE91MEt3EAE

reviews.comment:
Pésima atención, a los camioneros no los dejan usar la ducha a menos que carguen gas oil y si hechas tenes que ir con la boleta de gas oil! En ningún lado vi eso uno no tiene derecho a darse una ducha, viven todo el año de los camiones y ahora se ponen en artista seleccionando quien se puede duchar y quien no. Renegando con las cadenas y tenes que seguir embarrado hasta trelew o comodoro para poder bañarte. ASCO YPF NO CONSUMAN NADA

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service! Truck drivers aren't allowed to use the showers unless they fill up with diesel, and if you do, you have to bring the diesel receipt! I've never seen that anywhere. They don't have the right to shower; they live off their trucks all year round, and now they're acting like philanthropists, deciding who can shower and who can't. They're struggling with the chains, and you have to keep driving through the mud all the way to Trelew or Comodoro Rivadavia just to be able to shower. YPF is disgusting. Don't buy anything from them.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNyd2JmV1JnEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy limpios los baños, siempre que paso están impecables. Creo que lo que más importa

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms are very clean; they're always spotless when I go. I think that's what matters most.

reviews.comment:
Felicitaciones !!!!!a todos los chicos de la estación, estuvimos 30 horas colgados x corte de ruta, le predisposición de todos es admirable, agua caliente para mate gratis y duchas impecables !!!!!!!!!!!!! Muy buena onda !!!!

(Translated by Google)
Congratulations to all the guys at the station! We were stuck for 30 hours due to a road closure. Everyone's helpfulness was admirable, free hot water for mate, and spotless showers! Great atmosphere!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURMbXFMRDB3RRAB
